name: jask-search-insights

outputs.description: The action to take on the insight Jask.Insight.AssignedTo Who the insight was assigned to
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.Action

outputs.description: Insight description Jask.Insight.IpAddress Insight IP address
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.Description

outputs.description: When the insight was last updated Jask.Insight.LastUpdatedBy Who the insight was last updated by
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.LastUpdated

outputs.description: Insight severity Jask.Insight.InsightTime Time of the insight
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.Severity
